2603.25702.title: S2D2: Fast Decoding for Diffusion LLMs via Training-Free Self-Speculation
2603.25702.paper_summary: Block-diffusion language models offer a promising path toward faster-than-autoregressive generation by combining block-wise autoregressive decoding with within-block parallel denoising. However, in the few-step regime needed for practical acceleration, standard confidence-thresholded decoding is often brittle: aggressive thresholds hurt quality, while conservative thresholds require unnecessary denoising steps. Existing approaches that address this issue either require additional training or incur extra test-time compute. We present S2D2, a training-free self-speculative decoding framework for block-diffusion language models. Our key observation is that a block-diffusion model becomes autoregressive when the block size is reduced to one, allowing the same pretrained model to act as both drafter and verifier. S2D2 inserts a speculative verification step into standard block-diffusion decoding and uses lightweight routing policies to decide when verification is worth its cost. This yields a hybrid decoding trajectory in which diffusion proposes tokens in parallel, while the autoregressive mode acts as a local sequence-level critic. Across three mainstream block-diffusion families, S2D2 consistently improves the accuracy-speed tradeoff over strong confidence-thresholding baselines. On SDAR, we observe up to $4.7\times$ speedup over autoregressive decoding, and up to $1.57\times$ over a tuned dynamic decoding baseline while improving accuracy by up to $4.5$ points. On LLaDA2.1-Mini, S2D2 remains complementary to built-in self-correction, including a conservative setting where it is $4.4\times$ faster than the static baseline with slightly higher accuracy.
2603.25702.paper_summary_zh: 區塊擴散語言模型通過將區塊式自回歸解碼與區塊內並行去噪相結合，提供了一條朝向比自回歸生成更快的有希望的途徑。<lb/>然而，在實際加速所需的幾步範疇內，標準的信心閾值解碼通常是脆弱的：激進的閾值會損害質量，而保守的閾值則需要不必要的去噪步驟。<lb/>現有的解決方案要麼需要額外的訓練，要麼會增加測試時的計算負擔。<lb/>我們提出了 S2D2，一種無需訓練的自我推測解碼框架，用於區塊擴散語言模型。<lb/>我們的關鍵觀察是，當區塊大小減少到一時，區塊擴散模型變為自回歸，這使得同一個預訓練模型可以同時擔任起草者和驗證者。<lb/>S2D2 在標準區塊擴散解碼中插入了一個推測驗證步驟，並使用輕量級路由策略來決定何時驗證是值得的。<lb/>這產生了一條混合解碼軌跡，其中擴散並行提出標記，而自回歸模式則作為局部序列級的批評者。<lb/>在三個主流的區塊擴散家族中，S2D2 一直在準確性與速度的權衡上超越強信心閾值基準。<lb/>在 SDAR 上，我們觀察到相較於自回歸解碼，速度提升高達 $4.7\times$，而相較於調整過的動態解碼基準速度提升高達 $1.57\times$，同時準確性提高了最多 $4.5$ 點。<lb/>在 LLaDA2.1-Mini 上，S2D2 仍然與內建的自我修正互補，包括一個保守的設置，在該設置下它比靜態基準快 $4.4\times$，且準確性略高。
2603.25702.author: Ligong Han et.al.
2603.25702.authors: Ligong Han, Hao Wang, Han Gao, Kai Xu, Akash Srivastava
